narrative:
Cols 77-C (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,295 registered voters, with 67.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.9 percentage points.
